title: CM, Dy CM To Attend Mahakumbhabhishekam At Durga Temple On March 8
description: The event will culminate on March 8 at 9.24 am with Abhishekam to the temple’s golden gopuram using sacred waters collected from 12 holy rivers. Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu and Deputy Chief Minister Pawan Kalyan are expected to attend.
